data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "validate_to single-element-array unwrap + regression tests landed on origin/main (CI+LLM-Review green). Sole unmet criterion is the circular meta-AC 'earns a signed completion-verifier PASS' (the signature is produced BY closing). Closing uncertified by design.". Session: 31cebe57e.
